concerns.location: spec.md:User Story 2 – Scan Across Disorder Strengths to Locate the MBL‑Thermal Crossover
concerns.text: User Story 2 has no explicit functional requirement (FR‑xxx) or success criterion (SC‑xxx) linked to it. The story describes scanning a range of δ values and producing `delta_vs_exponent.csv`, but none of the listed FRs (FR‑001 … FR‑009) mention handling a Δ‑grid, generating that summary file, or validating the per‑δ fitting process. This orphaned story creates a gap in requirements coverage.
